supporting_evidence: Row-local seam relations remain coherent during collapse (`firstChildToDetailDeltaY=12.000`, `belowChildToFirstChildDeltaY=34.333`) and do not exhibit prior global-coordinate spikes.
Collapse lifecycle completes normally (`probe.collapse.end`, `animation.complete`) with `expanded=false` and `animating` toggling off as expected.
contradicting_evidence: No incident evidence indicates tentative-vs-committed app state mismatch or stale business-state reads.
Visible symptom persists after seam-owner hypothesis is deprioritized and row/table movement artifact is removed from the active frontier.
missing_evidence: A direct render-layer sample proving whether border/detail layers snap at compositing time while row-local layout deltas remain stable.
A per-frame correlation between detail clip/opacity presentation values and observed pink-border/detail visual snap.
candidates.next_discriminating_check: During one collapse, sample presentation-layer values for the detail clipping container and border stroke host (opacity, bounds.height, position.y) and compare against row-local seam deltas in the same session to confirm render/compositing snap versus layout incoherence.
